title: Emoji and Reactions
drDigitalIntro:
Emoji are small pictures that show feelings.
• Instead of typing "haha", send a laughing emoji 😂.
• There are thousands to choose from.
• You can also react to a message with a thumbs up, heart, or laugh.

playgroundTask.goal: You reacted to a message with an emoji

steps.say: Click on Sam to open their conversation.
React to Sam's message with an emoji.

drDigitalSuccess: A quick emoji reaction — no typing needed. A great way to say 'I saw this' or show how you feel.
drDigitalHint: Click Sam, then hover over one of their messages and click the smiley face that appears. Pick any emoji to react.
